SetupGuide.title: Welcome! Let's get your store ready
SetupGuide.subtitle: Complete these steps to start providing AI-powered skin & hair analysis to your customers.

step1.title: Enable App Embed
step1.description: Activate the Dermatics AI widget in your Shopify theme editor. This adds the floating analysis button to your storefront so customers can start their skin or hair assessment.

step2.title: Customize Your Widget
step2.description: Personalize the widget's appearance — colors, text, positioning, and drawer style — to match your store's branding. You can also configure the skin care and hair care module cards.

step3.title: Choose a Plan
step3.description: Select a plan that fits your store's needs. Free plans include limited monthly scans, while paid plans unlock unlimited usage, hair analysis, and priority support.

toast.embedEnabled: Widget is enabled on your storefront!
toast.embedNotDetected: Widget not detected yet. Make sure you saved in the theme editor.

completeBanner.title: You're all set!
completeBanner.description: Your Dermatics AI widget is live and ready for customers. Visit your storefront to see it in action.

SetupGuide.footer: Need help? Contact us at support@dermatics.in

customize.title: Customize Widget
customize.description: Configure the skin analysis questions, visual results, and personalized product recommendations.

skinCare.title: Skin Care
skinCare.description: Configure the skin analysis questions, visual results, and personalized product recommendations.

hairCare.title: Hair Care
hairCare.description: Tailor the hair assessment questionnaire and treatment logic for various hair types and concerns.

widget.iconUrlHelp: URL to an image for your widget icon.

preview.title: Storefront Preview
preview.description: Interact with the widget to see the drawer animations and styles.
preview.mockMessage: Hello! Welcome to your digital consultation. Let's get started!
